text: Work centered on the openreview systematic-review workspace's dashboard and study-creation flow, driven by repeated "start fresh and walk the happy path" testing. An initial attempt to run a review on studies claiming anger is stored in fat cells surfaced a Unicode/cp1252 encoding error in the tooling, prompting discussion of whether the skills or tools (server.py, build_report.py, and related scripts) needed hardening. Subsequent cycles reproduced and chased a dashboard bug where the link to a newly created study returned {"error": "IndexError: list index out of range"}, with data being deleted and the report rebuilt from scratch between runs. The session ended on a still-open regression: after a protocol is written the dashboard now shows the study card but no longer auto-navigates the user into the newly created study, behavior the README documents and that had worked earlier.
